X.value: Claim amounts (in thousands) following density f(x) = 0.5 x^2 e^{-x} for x > 0
X.description: Claim amounts for wind damage to insured homes, measured in thousands of dollars, with density function f(x) = 0.5 x^2 e^{-x} for x > 0. The expected value E[X] = ∫₀^∞ x · 0.5 x^2 e^{-x} dx = 3 is computed directly from this distribution.
